executiveSummary: Sample payload for documentation and manual DB seeding. Scores are illustrative.

uiUx.summary: Clear hero hierarchy with a strong primary CTA; secondary actions could be quieter.
improvements: Increase spacing between hero metrics for scanability.
Align illustration grid to an 8px baseline.

responsiveness.summary: Likely stacks well, but dense tables may overflow on small phones.
improvements: Test pricing table as horizontally scrollable with sticky first column.
Bump tap targets to at least 44px on mobile CTAs.

accessibility.summary: Semantic headings appear reasonable; verify contrast on muted text.
improvements: Audit focus rings on ghost buttons over imagery.
Ensure form errors are announced to screen readers.

seo.summary: Title and H1 likely aligned; check meta descriptions for key landing pages.
improvements: Add structured data for product and FAQ sections.
Consolidate duplicate H1 patterns on long-scroll pages.

performance.summary: Hero media may dominate LCP; prioritize responsive images.
improvements: Preload the primary hero typeface subset.

colorUsage.summary: Cohesive cool palette with disciplined accent usage.
improvements: Reduce gradient noise behind body copy for readability.
Introduce a single warning color token for alerts.

typography.summary: Readable scale; subheadings could use tighter tracking at large sizes.
improvements: Cap line length at ~68 characters in blog sections.
Pair display headings with a calmer body face.

cta.summary: Primary CTA is obvious; repeated CTAs are consistent.
improvements: Add microcopy under the hero CTA to reduce uncertainty.
Surface a tertiary text link for security-conscious buyers.
